essence: Supports ML engineers by maintaining training pipelines, labelling data, and running experiments at scale.

identity.title: Machine Learning Technician
identity.summary: Manages datasets, runs training jobs, monitors model performance, and helps productionise ML workflows under engineer supervision.

salary.notes: Experience with MLOps tooling and cloud platforms increases value.

qualifications: Practical experience with data pipelines, Docker, and cloud compute
Familiarity with ML frameworks and experiment tracking
Attention to data quality and reproducibility

lifestyle.description: Lab and cloud work supporting ML teams; mix of repetitive pipeline tasks and problem solving when experiments fail.
